            Brendan Robert E. Ansell
          
          
            
              I am a computational biologist using genetic data to study diseases of the brain and the retina. I work with a fantastic team at the WEHI in Melbourne, Australia.
              I also teach R workshops.

articles.title: Research
articles.contents:
My research is focused on understanding the brain and the retina in health and disease. I use computational and statistical techniques to draw insights from huge volumes of biological sequencing data.

You can find a list of my scientific publications here.

articles.title: Teaching
articles.contents:
I teach workshops in R for data analysis, automation and visualization.


My recent book could help you to learn R.
